CustomField.description: DeveloperName reference matching a NEPA_Agency_Endpoint__mdt record that holds the Named Credential and REST path for this agency's NEPA status API. Used by NepaAgencyPermitService to look up the endpoint configuration at runtime without hardcoded URLs.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reference to the NEPA_Agency_Endpoint__mdt record for the agency's permit status API (e.g., USACE_ORM2, FERC_eLIBRARY).
CustomField.label: Agency Endpoint Reference
